title: Delhivery Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhivery Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Delhivery Ventures Solutions family as a E-commerce Executive in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
